use_cases: Vertical navigation menus for landing pages or portfolio sites
Animated navigation routing between page sections
Feature showcase menus for product documentation sites
Minimalist site navigation with hover interactions
ai_summary: An animated vertical navigation menu component featuring reveal-on-hover arrow indicators and text skew effects. Built with framer-motion for smooth entrance animations, supporting custom colors and skew intensity via props. Ideal for minimalist website navigation where visual hierarchy and subtle motion enhance the user experience.
